calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the San Francisco District Attorney (415-553-4997) appears as counsel for the Petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition filed. The claim of claimant is struck. Petitioner may withdraw the Petition for forfeiture and proceed with non-judicial forfeiture proceedings. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Raymond Fong In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]

Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymond Fong, Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9583, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted, no opposition.
